sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41878" key="e)pousiastiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπουσι-αστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n41878.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">denoting material,</tr_> of Adjs. in <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ειος,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.58</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
